---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new integration or tool for homelab-mcp
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is this a new service integration or a new tool on an existing service?**
E.g., "Add Unifi controller support" or "Add restart button to Radarr".

**What would it do?**
Describe the tools and what they'd let Claude do.

**Does the service have an API or is it SSH-based?**
Provide a link to the API docs if available.

**Additional context**
Any other details.
